name: M-tron Industries, Inc.
summary: In this Annual Report on Form 10-K,the terms "Mtron," the "Company," "we," "us," and "our" refer collectively to M-tron Industries, Inc. and its subsidiaries. Unless otherwise stated, all dollar amounts are in thousands. General Originally founded in 1965, M-tron Industries, Inc.is engaged in the designing, manufacturing and marketing of highly engineered, high reliability frequency and spectrum control products used to control the frequency or timing of signals in electronic circuits in various...
